reviews.review_description: If you love Gorilla Tag, you will love this game.  This is what is called a Gorilla Tag fan game and it is very fun.  It has Only Up with 4 parts as of August 21st 2025, it has horror, you can play with friends, there's a new caves update to run around in, and a shop.  More coming soon.  Tag leaked?  Monke Blocks leaked? PvP leaked? This game has lots of potential and I think everyone should play it.
there are so many players that don't put their name in when getting the game so when you do get the game (if you do hopefully) then SET YOUR NAME!
